args.query:
SELECT ltrim(trim(o.OwnerId),'#') AS AgentId, SUM(oi.Quantity * oi.UnitPrice) AS Sales
FROM OrderItem oi
JOIN "Order" o ON ltrim(trim(oi.OrderId),'#') = ltrim(trim(o.Id),'#')
WHERE DATE(o.EffectiveDate) BETWEEN DATE('2022-06-25') AND DATE('2022-11-25')
GROUP BY AgentId
ORDER BY Sales DESC
LIMIT 1;
